Comment.MultiLanguageText: Axes are on Area Measure station 1
Axes are on Area Measure station 2
Gate for going to area laser Station 1
Gate for going to area laser Station 2
Ask for going to laser Area Station 1
Ask for going to laser Area Station 2
Axe X1 enter to laser Area
Axe X2 enter to laser Area

LineComment.Text: Comment/Function: manages two zones (laser or measurement) on two statio
present, based on the position of the axes and/or the state of a keyboard button.
It dynamically switches the software limits OF the axes (limit 1 OR 2) according
TO the active zone, allowing the machine’s safety AND behavior TO adapt TO each
Version | Date | Expert in charge | Changes applied
Disable Key [16] - collision detection of the ZL axis with the X axis // WFA ??
On channel change, update the MCP button to reflect the toggle status of the newly selected channel
M60: Axes Limit for Laser Area
M61: Axes Limit for Measure Area

StructuredText.Text: Conditions to switch the limit of axis
Switch of the limit of axis (laser --> limit 2 / Measure --> Limit 1)

LineComment.Text: Read in disable: laser 1 : gate NOT ready

StructuredText.Text: Anticollision - A REVOIR LORS MISE EN ROUTE

LineComment.Text: Ne sert plus a rien car 0<v<200
Pas compris pour eviter collision avec x1 et v1
Ne sert plus a rien car -22<ZM1<160
Pas compris pour eviter collision avec x1 et v1
WFA VOIR SI CUTTING NECESSAIRE POUR MACHINE MONO

StructuredText.Text: Cutting : M62 waiting laser cutting free

LineComment.Text: M62: Axes Limit for Cutting Area

StructuredText.Text: Set cutting busy by X pos : JOG, man, prog interrupt, prog err

LineComment.Text: if in cuting area without gate_cut:stop
Copie de la FL0125, Pas sur que ca existe sur les FEMTO 5A mono ou twin
A voir egalement les colisions à partir du code de la FL0107
IF "LBP_Chan1".MDyn[62] THEN // M62: Axes Limit for Cutting Area
IF "LBP_Chan2".MDyn[62] THEN // M62: Axes Limit for Cutting Area
